memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-19 — Risk-off market + NVDA earnings tomorrow

- S&P 500 down 0.55% (third consecutive losing session). 30-year Treasury 5.18% (19-year high).
- NVDA earnings TOMORROW May 20 after close (not May 21 as prev noted). 48h window active.
- AMD re-scored 5.67 (rejected). Price fell to $397.83 from $445 breakout level — 10.6% decline. Breakout thesis void.
- PLTR $134 reclaimed ($135.14) but re-scored 6.17 due to macro risk-off environment.
- Strategy switch LT sells unconfirmed for 5+ trading days. OPERATOR MUST ACT TODAY.
- BTC $77,119 — below $82K threshold. Iran uncertainty + yield spike drove crypto liquidations.

### 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-18 — 18 consecutive silent failures

- No routines ran May 15, 16, 18 (all silent failures). Entire 3-day trading window missed.
- Strategy switch MOO sells (TSM/NVDA/JPM/AVGO for May 18 open) not executed programmatically.

### 2026-05-14 — Trump-Xi Summit Day 1, NVDA +4.54%

- S&P 500 record +0.79% to 7,511. Jensen Huang attended summit. H200 chips cleared for select Chinese companies.
- Portfolio at +0.51% vs SPX +4.32% — -3.81pp gap from API blockage keeping 80%+ in cash.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **30-year Treasury yield:** 5.18% — highest in ~19 years. Headwind for growth/tech valuations. No rate cuts until 2027+.
- **S&P 500 May 19:** ~$7,469 (-0.55%) — third consecutive losing session from May 14 record $7,511. Chip stocks leading Nasdaq lower.
- **Iran:** Trump May 18 called off scheduled attack; 'serious negotiations' underway. Oil surged back to $108/bbl. Geopolitical risk premium maintained.
- **NVDA earnings:** May 20 after close (NOT May 21). 48h window active. EPS est $1.78 (+120% YoY), revenue $79.2B (+79.5% YoY). 90% beat probability (Polymarket). Strategy switch mandates closing position TODAY.
- **Bitcoin:** $77,119 — below $80K. Iran+yields drove $657M liquidations this week. Re-entry threshold $82K unchanged.
- **AMD:** $397.83 — down 10.6% from planned entry at $445. Breakout thesis void.
